---
title: "Decision trees"
subtitle: "CART for regression and classification"
date: "Oct 30, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Recursive binary splitting; impurity measures (Gini, entropy); tree pruning via cost-complexity; trees as interpretable but high-variance learners.

**Assigned reading:** ISLR §8.1

---

## Materials

**Slides:** [Slides](slides_clean.pdf) | [Annotated slides](slides_annotated.pdf)

**Code:** [app1.R](code/app1.R) [class10_lab1.Rmd](code/class10_lab1.Rmd) [fig1.R](code/fig1.R) [fig2.R](code/fig2.R) [fig3.R](code/fig3.R) [fig4.R](code/fig4.R)

**Supplementary readings:** [Breiman (2001)](readings/Breiman (2001).pdf) [Chen and Ishwaran (2012)](readings/Chen and Ishwaran (2012).pdf) [Watanabe et al. (2021)](readings/Watanabe et al. (2021).pdf)
